--- title: Activity Diagram - ZKP Tooling Comparison config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (Education_ClassroomService) for ZKP tooling comparison workflow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Define ZKP requirements
(Education_ClassroomService)" as Define state "Shortlist ZKP libraries" as Shortlist state "Evaluate integration fit
(Education_ClassroomService)" as Fit state "Run benchmarks
(Education_ClassroomService)" as Bench state "Select candidate for PoC" as Select state "Reject or defer candidate" as Reject state "Document decision and risks" as Document [Education_LMS_Portal] --> Define Define --> Shortlist Shortlist --> Fit: fits platform constraints Shortlist --> Reject: lacks required support Fit --> Bench Bench --> Select: meets PoC targets Bench --> Shortlist: fails targets Reject --> Shortlist Select --> Document Document --> [Education_ClassroomService]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Education ClassroomService设计一个ZKP工具选型的工作流图。起点应该是从LMS Portal触发，先定义需求，然后进入候选库的筛选环节。
明白。那在Shortlist之后，评估维度怎么拆分？我想到两条分支：符合平台约束的就去做集成适配评估，直接不满足条件的就拒绝掉。
对，Fit节点要注明是针对Education ClassroomService的集成评估。通过评估的进入Benchmark环节，没通过的就直接Reject。
已经画好了。Bench之后我设计了两个出口：满足PoC指标的就Select，不满意的返回Shortlist重新考虑其他候选。另外Reject之后也能回到Shortlist做补充筛选。
Bench到Shortlist的返回箭头标注需要改一下，应该是"fails targets"而不是"fails target"，要用复数。还有Select之后要有个Document节点，记录决策依据和风险。
已修正标注，加上了Document节点。最后Document的输出应该落回到Education ClassroomService对吧？
没错。整个流程闭环了：从LMS Portal发起，经过Define、Shortlist、Fit、Bench、Select、Document，最终输出到ClassroomService。Shortlist到Fit的条件标注也确认一下是"fits platform constraints"。
全部核对完成。Shortlist到Reject是"lacks required support"，Shortlist到Fit是"fits platform constraints"，Bench到Select是"meets PoC targets"，Bench返回Shortlist是"fails targets"。所有状态都带上了Education ClassroomService的业务标识。
